textByHash.76c6578b3f74d86b3d6366805f04142ec2358973: Sorry, I am not authorised to talk to you.
textByHash.f56deabb6a60785b3903621066e6ecb5183b83e7: And greetings to you too, visitor.
textByHash.14933a5db49720a98d0027f89c44c32b8b8c5284: I see. Well, there are no more demons left here.
textByHash.767891df031e30ad175128dfdf9261ce0efca26e: Their standard gliders must have fallen prey to the tropical weather.
textByHash.c37a12ed878548e9455f39a854cbf81f475f8dd3: We are no closer to reinitialising sir - the code is too hard. It is likely the only person who could do it is Glough.
textByHash.20d5207302b8beb7389eee771c21374308ed697c: As Daero said, they are a prototype for a new version of glider. They are reinforced yet are built out of lighter materials. They can fly much faster and for longer.
textByHash.c37b8d4d9cfc573a8a76d71e6d3e49debcfee87a: It is the most compact way to store them. Unfortunately, they will remain like that until they are powered. We can only fully power the hangar when reinitialisation has been completed.
textByHash.5f32fe083659d9b77a6de0f6ca2ab4814926fa62: I cannot be sure. It is a difficult code; it may happen the next instant - then again it may not.
textByHash.12e99d258b7a7ef2bdf4ed69aa7b496edc24e08d: You could even have a go at solving the code yourself.
textByHash.f5927f3cd2c317956af6b4a7beb24bf806a518d1: The code must be entered at the red control panel just by the wall over there.
textByHash.6ae15aac2c0033af31455745c1ba945a41b1ef59: Well done on breaking the code. You should speak to the High Tree Guardian.
textByHash.422689d6f217191da78b2c5ed5d7ac00af47e7a6: You should stock up well on food before our journey. I can carry only enough provisions for myself.
textByHash.241dc6a0e0a93f15247682ac52074f819dabe284: I'd be careful of the local fauna too - I've heard the bite is far worse than any noise they make.
textByHash.8765068b27de27c4145331318bb290813577e1f8: Do you wish to fly right now?
textByHash.162e635f0d5f38239f8ca2e806f7add76bcf0df8: I am not sure. We appear to have landed where the 10th squad crashed. The number of gnome gliders is correct. Unfortunately for them, it appears that none of their gliders survived the collision.
textByHash.4e277fac72a99c0e22ae9a1008c8ee6182a07589: During our descent I noticed a large populated island far to the west. I suggest we try and make our way there.
textByHash.7416ffb0cefafad743f54c465318f5efa773697f: If I recall correctly, which I probably do, he is Lumdo of the 10th squad. I imagine he has been left to guard their gliders.
textByHash.5303676a09ba97b0a26dac75db853d18a36f17a4: Let me remind you that we are on a mission for King Narnode. We must attend to this mission.
textByHash.eb5c901f06aec25ca67cb82c8d5e56a5e6964046: His zeal in this matter is to be expected. The Royal Guard - in particular the 10th squad - are renowned for their fierce loyalty.
textByHash.01a066d5e0a4a3c50f8f4568368720f91eaf6710: I would rather not get involved. My mission is to protect you.
textByHash.9c0b9486a58a404896892023a848cdc83533d36c: You are becoming tiresome, human. As you wish.
textByHash.9e275b5ffd2b74adff0cb48cf46b78ba2f866884: Foot soldier Lumdo of the 10th squad.
textByHash.6e7568c1b950b8f3a58e2a3eda5f2d3e0dbe14d8: I am Flight Commander Waydar. I believe you are under direct orders from your Sergeant to guard these gliders?
textByHash.3f06fa8c16ccefdc004bdeed3c418abcf2c30634: I need not remind you that I outrank Garkor. As of this instant, your orders are to convey the human to the atoll and remain there until he needs to return.
textByHash.6bdfb79273859f1b6751329309355b1ad49ae6f4: I need not remind you that I outrank Garkor. As of this instant, your orders are to convey the human to the atoll and remain there until she needs to return.
textByHash.dbd8bfab5b3b9cc95785d7f5c8630c29802890a2: I need not remind you that I outrank Garkor. As of this instant, your orders are to convey the human to the atoll and remain there until they need to return.
textByHash.7225b7b12d54492a7f8a84d887ecf41fa29e38ac: Then he can take up his issues with me personally.
textByHash.5cadb237c2eda1b1cb2fc453276994412e4f4839: No. After all, somebody has to look after the gliders.
textByHash.41284d6c5162009b7dda9e499579ce363494c367: Enough. Return here when you are done.
textByHash.27ee3a20a9b43c012567cb6516b98f8c5e12c597: Shall we return to Crash Island?
textByHash.e0c5b08a2e87c8dcb08d92742d89441fdd55335c: It is good to see you again, Caranock. It is a strange island these monkeys inhabit.
textByHash.017a1bf2146709bb5b4b8453f931489b9d753f9e: I am now a Flight Commander. My duties include testing Glough's prototype military glider.
textByHash.139ee2266183f23ededdd08efacb3fde58ecfcb9: The human? Just somebody Narnode appears to have taken a fancy to. It is hard to tell why. I suspect the human was involved with Glough's fall from grace.
textByHash.5de348d28e0dae8593f4da68cf4d41b206e68638: I see. What do you have in mind?
textByHash.113df5f06d6c469899b7bb63557478e87b0ec3ba: This I know. But I don't see how it leads to money or promotion.
textByHash.fb52e6ea7be558e8bee2103b084d2586cd74897b: Very clever. It might also serve us well to remind Narnode of Bolren's situation.
textByHash.6a4e3345b6b2884c59eb17f2eb3d3d5cdb2562c0: Really? Typical meddling human behaviour. Nevertheless, it will stoke fires of worry. After all, the battle still continues.
textByHash.0f485b1a9b7d84d55fe0b0dc445580e766c36c73: Understood. Military gliders are after all an untested form of transport...
textByHash.8be82634d8822a818d0e56d326787537abec7a7c: Caranock and I have a suggestion to make.
textByHash.f844d7600aa9594c7ea957279555ad868d393be6: The foot soldiers of the Royal Guard in your jail...
textByHash.c235f34a2fc6713c97ba6d8b567cf5993f60db78: You are of course welcome to your share of the profits.
textByHash.5a761f03542c9023bdfcfd030fc1fbefb85f997a: Hmmm... as you wish... Why are you looking at me like that?
